---
title: "LEAF model"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(odelia)
library(tidyverse)
setwd(here::here("inst/examples/leaf_thermal"))

Rcpp::sourceCpp("src/leaf_thermal_interface.cpp",
  verbose = TRUE, rebuild = TRUE
)

source("R/leaf_thermal_interface.R")

# External drivers for air temperature (sinusoid)
Tmean <- 32.0
Tamp <- 6.0
tpeak <- 15.0
time <- seq(0, 5 * 24, by = 0.1)
t_air <- pars$Tmean + pars$Tamp * sin(2.0 * pi * (time - pars$tpeak) / 24.0)

drivers <- Drivers$new()
drivers$set_variable("temperature", time, t_air)
expect_equal(drivers$evaluate("temperature", 1), 35)
expect_error(drivers$evaluate("temp", 1))

# Define parameters
pars <- LeafThermalSystemPars()

lz <- LeafThermalSystem$new(pars)

lz$pars() # Todo: ideally named list
lz$set_state(c(25), 0) # Todo: should take values of drivers too? Otherwise rates shouldn't work
lz$state() # current state
lz$rates() # current dy/dt

# Setup runner
ctrl <- OdeControl_default()

runner <- LeafThermalSolver$new(lz$ptr, ctrl) 
times <- seq(0, 5 * 24, by = 0.1)
runner$advance_adaptive(times) # todo: pass in drivers here??

# Collect output
out <- runner$history() |>
  mutate(time = times, strategy = "baseline")

# Make a plot

vars <- c("T_air", "T_LC")

out |>
  pivot_longer(-c(strategy, time)) |>
  filter(name %in% vars) |>
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = vars)) |>
  ggplot(aes(time, value, colour = name)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw() 
```
